name: PixelFormat
description: PixelFormat schema from Asset Graph API

big_endian.description: If pixel RGB data are in big-endian

bits_per_pixel.description: How many bits in a single full pixel datum. Valid values are: 8, 16, 32

blue_shift.description: How many bits to right shift a pixel datum to get blue bits in lsb

green_shift.description: How many bits to right shift a pixel datum to get green bits in lsb

red_shift.description: How many bits to right shift a pixel datum to get red bits in lsb

true_color.description: If false, color maps are used
